risks: Storage account encryption is set to MicrosoftManaged, contradicting the stated CMK requirement for encrypted outputs
ADLSv2 (hierarchicalNamespace: true) cannot be used as the default storage account for Azure ML workspace per Azure documentation
Application Insights resource is missing; it is a required associated resource for Azure ML workspace creation
No separate standard storage account (without HNS) defined for the Azure ML workspace default storage
No managed identity resource defined in plan.resources despite being referenced in the security section
Network defaults to public endpoints with no VNet isolation for ML workspace or storage
correctionsRecommended: Change storage account encryption from MicrosoftManaged to CustomerManaged and reference Key Vault kv-secure-ml for CMK
Add a separate standard StorageAccount (without hierarchicalNamespace) as the Azure ML workspace default storage
Add an Application Insights resource linked to the Log Analytics workspace la-audit-logs for ML workspace monitoring
Add a User-Assigned Managed Identity resource for service-to-service authentication between ML workspace, storage, and Key Vault
Add a Container Registry resource for custom ML training environments and Docker image management
Disable storage account local auth (key access) and public blob access per Azure security best practices
Add explicit dependency links between the Azure ML workspace and its associated resources (storage, key vault, application insights)
hardDependencies: Azure ML workspace requires an associated non-HNS storage account and Application Insights instance; neither is present or correctly linked in the current plan
